title: euodia hortensis f. simplicifolia
intro: Euodia hortensis f. simplicifolia, also known as the Chinese rowan or rowan, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family and is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating pain. The health benefits of Euodia hortensis f. simplicifolia are also attributed to its ability to improve cardiovascular health and its potential to exhibit antimicrobial properties. In terms of herbal preparations, Euodia hortensis f. simplicifolia is often used in decoctions, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
